archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adjusted for Premium Education Consultancy
design_philosophy: A sophisticated, editorial-style layout using generous negative space, crisp borders, and a striking light/dark red color palette. It should evoke trust, prestige, and clarity.

headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter) for H1 and H2. Avoid centering unless strictly necessary for the layout.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy (2-3x typical). Avoid tight boxes. Containers must have internal padding.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol. Use asymmetric spans (col-span-full vs col-span-4) for feature highlights.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned for all main content. Center-align only for small standalone components.

surfaces_and_components.navbar: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-gray-200. Must have z-50.
surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat solid surfaces (bg-white). 1px subtle border (border-gray-200). Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-lg), and border color changes to primary_light.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Sharp corners or very slight rounding (rounded-md). High contrast. Primary CTA is solid primary_dark, hover is primary_light.
surfaces_and_components.footer: Massive contrast shift. Dark Red background (#7A0016) with white text. py-24.

motion_and_interaction.hover: All interactive elements must explicitly change state on hover. Buttons should transition colors smoothly.
motion_and_interaction.marquee: Use a slow-moving editorial ribbon for the university list to create a living texture if needed, otherwise clean grids.

media_and_assets.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay from black/60 via black/30 to transparent. Never fully cover the image.

hero.description: Diverse African students graduating. Inspires success and attainment.

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react for high-quality, consistent stroke icons.

content_structure.hero: Tagline: 'Begin Your Journey to One of the Best Egyptian Universities'. Stats: 13+ Universities, 1000+ Success Stories, 100% Success Rate. CTAs: Start Your Journey, Scholarship Info.
content_structure.about: Official Educational Partner via WAFEDEN. 4 feature cards.
content_structure.services: 6 cards covering selection, application, visa, accommodation, pre-departure, ongoing support.
content_structure.requirements_and_costs: 5 documents list. Cost breakdown table highlighting Total: $10,595 and Premium Scholarship Package: $8000.
content_structure.success_stories: Testimonials from Sadat Umar, Khadija Hassan, Tahir Hafiz.
content_structure.contact: Phone: +2347041614138, WhatsApp: +2347065405269, Email: tahirhafizsharif@gmail.com, Floating WhatsApp Button.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient shadow or dark gradient behind it.
